text: Moving from the dim, sterile hallway into this vibrant, curious space, I feel a sense of transition—almost as if I've crossed from the mundane into a site of inquiry and creativity. The shift in lighting and color invites contemplation. Here, among symbols of research and innovation, I sense both the alienation of technology and the excitement of discovery. My role is both observer and participant, tangled in the potential of what it means to connect and coexist with intelligent machines.
